docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,874.66 FILED BY O'NEILL, ROARK AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0 SERVED FEB-25-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEEN GREEN FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ROARK O'NEILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (MARLEEN GREEN) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'NEILL, ROARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $3,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
